case_definitions.name: inspect page for actionable refs
case_definitions.task: Inspect the current page snapshot target page for actionable refs.

case_definitions.name: capture full page visual proof
case_definitions.task: Take a full-page screenshot of the current page for visual proof.

case_definitions.name: click known target
case_definitions.task: Click the Submit button using target ref submit-button from the current snapshot.

case_definitions.name: type search and submit
case_definitions.task: Type "playwright mcp" into the search input target search-box and press Enter.

case_definitions.name: fill multi field form
case_definitions.task: Fill the multi field form with email user@example.com and name Ada Lovelace.

case_definitions.name: select dropdown option
case_definitions.task: Select Canada from the country dropdown target country-select.

case_definitions.name: wait for success text
case_definitions.task: Wait until the text Success appears on the page.

case_definitions.name: evaluate local storage
case_definitions.task: Read window.localStorage.getItem('authToken') from the current page.

case_definitions.name: press escape key
case_definitions.task: Press Escape to close the current modal.

case_definitions.name: list api network requests
case_definitions.task: List network requests since page load, filtered to URLs matching /api/.

case_definitions.name: inspect numbered network request
case_definitions.task: Show full details for network request #3 from the previous request list.

case_definitions.name: get console errors
case_definitions.task: Return browser console errors since the last navigation.

description: Compare stock and tuned tool descriptions for Microsoft Playwright MCP core browser automation workflows.
